# Hague Creek Companies

Hague Creek Companies is an Arizona rural community specialist focused on real estate entitlement, land brokerage, and agricultural asset management. Tagline: Rural Community Specialists. Connecting with clients through integrity, western values, and the land.

## Contact Information
- **Name:** Hague Creek Companies
- **Entity:** Hague Creek Properties, Inc. (AZ CO626111000)
- **President:** Erik Swanson
- **Email:** info@haguecreek.com
- **Physical Address:** 2114 E Taxidea Way, Phoenix, AZ 85048
- **Website:** https://haguecreek.com/
- **Operating Hours:** Mon-Fri 08:00 AM - 05:00 PM MST

## Primary Keyword
- Arizona land broker

## Core Services
- Rural land & ranch brokerage
- Real estate entitlement
- Agricultural asset management
- Supporting aviation / rural development services

## Service Regions
- Maricopa County / Phoenix metro
- Pima County / Tucson
- Cochise County
- Yavapai County
- Statewide Arizona rural markets

## Main Navigation / Sitemap
- Home — https://haguecreek.com/
- About (Erik Swanson) — https://haguecreek.com/#about-section
- Properties — https://haguecreek.com/#listings-section
- Resources / FAQ — https://haguecreek.com/#faq-section
- Blog — https://haguecreek.com/#blog-section
